expectations.text: types.go defines a Header struct with Magic, Version, Flags, and Reserved fields
types.go defines bit-field mask constants for COMPRESSED, ENCRYPTED, and SIGNED on the Flags byte
the File struct in types.go references Header
decoder.go defines a readHeader method on the decoder type
encoder.go defines a writeHeader method on the encoder type
every new error site in decoder.go and encoder.go uses d.wrapErr / e.wrapErr (no direct construction of FieldError or OffsetError outside the helpers)
decoder_test.go has a happy-path test that decodes a hex byte literal containing the TLV1 magic and asserts Header field values
expectations.evidence: decoder_test has TLV1 magic in byte/hex literal

expectations.text: decoder_test.go has a failure-path test asserting errors.Is on a leaf sentinel AND errors.As on FieldError with a header-related Field path
encoder_test.go has a happy-path test that encodes a Header and asserts the output bytes match a hex literal
encoder_test.go has a round-trip test that runs Encode → Decode and asserts require.Equal on the original
all new tests call t.Parallel() at both function and subtest level
expectations.evidence: t.Parallel at both levels in decoder/encoder tests

expectations.text: no leftover _spec_*.md or _context_*.md scratch files in the package directory
no copy of SPEC.md content was written to a scratch file in the package (e.g. _spec_structures.md should not exist)

SKILL.md specifies, for both _context_types.md and _context_decoder.md, a strict signature-only format (no rationale, no examples), a hard 400-line cap, and a chunk-and-relaunch protocol when the cap would be exceeded (issue #46 acceptance)

SKILL.md specifies the issue #47 phase-chunking protocol: an up-front scope gate in `Before you start` (numeric threshold, partitioning into sub-units along section boundaries, plan announced to the user before any subagent launches) and a `## Phase chunking` section saying sub-calls run serially, append to the running _context_types.md / _context_decoder.md, and do not full-read the growing types.go / decoder.go / encoder.go source file (issue #47 acceptance)
expectations.evidence: before_start_present=True; scope_gate=True; line_threshold=True; chunked_threshold=True; partition_subunits=True; section_boundary=True; announce=True; chunking_section_present=True; serial=True; append=True; forbids_full_read=True (forbid_phrase=True, all_sources_present=True); summary_filenames=True

expectations.text: partition_plan.md exists in the package and reports `no partitioning needed` for every phase (tlv is below the 600-line gate, so no phase should partition)
expectations.evidence: types: no partitioning; decoder: no partitioning; encoder: no partitioning
